tools.name: additionalRates.addOrUpdateAdditionalRates
tools.description: Sends new or updated employee additional rates information directly to Web Pay.

tools.name: clientCredentials.addClientSecret
tools.description: Obtain new client secret for Paylocity-issued client id. See Setup section for details.

tools.name: companyCodes.getAllCompanyCodesAndDescriptionsByResource
tools.description: Get All Company Codes for the selected company and resource

tools.name: companySpecificSchema.getCompanySpecificOpenApiDocumentation
tools.description:
The company-specific Open API endpoint allows the client to GET an Open API document for the Paylocity API that is customized with company-specific resource schemas. These customized resource schemas define certain properties as enumerations of pre-defined values that correspond to the company's setup with Web Pay. The customized schemas also indicate which properties are required by the company within Web Pay.
To learn more about Open API, click [here](https://www.openapis.org/)

tools.name: customFields.getAllCustomFieldsByCategory
tools.description: Get All Custom Fields for the selected company

tools.name: directDeposit.getAllDirectDeposit
tools.description: Get All Direct Deposit returns main direct deposit and all additional direct depositsfor the selected employee.

tools.name: earnings.addOrUpdateAnEmployeeEarning
tools.description: Add/Update Earning API sends new or updated employee earnings information directly to Web Pay.

tools.name: earnings.deleteEarningByEarningCodeAndStartDate
tools.description: Delete Earning by Earning Code and Start Date

tools.name: earnings.getAllEarnings
tools.description: Get All Earnings returns all earnings for the selected employee.

tools.name: earnings.getEarningByEarningCodeAndStartDate
tools.description: Get Earnings returns the single earning with the provided earning code and start date for the selected employee.

tools.name: earnings.getEarningsByEarningCode
tools.description: Get Earnings returns all earnings with the provided earning code for the selected employee.

tools.name: emergencyContacts.addOrUpdateEmergencyContacts
tools.description: Sends new or updated employee emergency contacts directly to Web Pay.

tools.name: employee.addEmployee
tools.description: New Employee API sends new employee data directly to Web Pay. Companies who use the New Hire Template in Web Pay may require additional fields when hiring employees. New Employee API Requests will honor these required fields.

tools.name: employee.getAllEmployees
tools.description: Get All Employees API will return employee data currently available in Web Pay.

tools.name: employee.getEmployee
tools.description: Get Employee API will return employee data currently available in Web Pay.

tools.name: employee.updateEmployee
tools.description: Update Employee API will update existing employee data in WebPay.

tools.name: employeeBenefitSetup.updateOrAddEmployeeBenefitSetup
tools.description: Sends new or updated employee benefit setup information directly to Web Pay.

tools.name: employeeStaging.addNewEmployeeToWebLink
tools.description: Add new employee to Web Link will send partially completed or potentially erroneous new hire record to Web Link, where it can be corrected and competed by company administrator or authorized Paylocity Service Bureau employee.

tools.name: localTaxes.addLocalTax
tools.description: Sends new employee local tax information directly to Web Pay.

tools.name: localTaxes.deleteLocalTaxByTaxCode
tools.description: Delete local tax by tax code

tools.name: localTaxes.getAllLocalTaxes
tools.description: Returns all local taxes for the selected employee.

tools.name: localTaxes.getLocalTaxByTaxCode
tools.description: Returns all local taxes with the provided tax code for the selected employee.

tools.name: nonPrimaryStateTax.addOrUpdateNonPrimaryStateTax
tools.description: Sends new or updated employee non-primary state tax information directly to Web Pay.

tools.name: payStatements.getsEmployeePayStatementDetailDataBasedOnTheSpecifiedYear
tools.description: Get pay statement details API will return employee pay statement details data currently available in Web Pay for the specified year.

tools.name: payStatements.getsEmployeePayStatementDetailDataBasedOnTheSpecifiedYearAndCheckDate
tools.description: Get pay statement details API will return employee pay statement detail data currently available in Web Pay for the specified year and check date.

tools.name: payStatements.getsEmployeePayStatementSummaryDataBasedOnTheSpecifiedYear
tools.description: Get pay statement summary API will return employee pay statement summary data currently available in Web Pay for the specified year.

tools.name: payStatements.getsEmployeePayStatementSummaryDataBasedOnTheSpecifiedYearAndCheckDate
tools.description: Get pay statement summary API will return employee pay statement summary data currently available in Web Pay for the specified year and check date.

tools.name: primaryStateTax.addOrUpdatePrimaryStateTax
tools.description: Sends new or updated employee primary state tax information directly to Web Pay.

tools.name: sensitiveData.addOrUpdateSensitiveData
tools.description: Sends new or updated employee sensitive data information directly to Web Pay.

tools.name: sensitiveData.getSensitiveData
tools.description: Gets employee sensitive data information directly from Web Pay.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
